note: mock_rate encodes the IDEAL outcome so `--decider mock` demonstrates the pipeline; real deciders (api/claude-cli) ignore it and measure the description. `readme` owns generating/updating README.md from real codebase analysis; near-misses belong to changelog (CHANGELOG.md), docs-search (find existing docs), explain (explain code), documentation-writer (prose style), or plain file ops.
